---
title: "assemblykor Cheat Sheet"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: cosmo
    css: !expr NULL
    self_contained: true
    toc: false
geometry: landscape, margin=1cm
---

```{css, echo = FALSE}
body {
  font-family: "Noto Sans KR", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", sans-serif;
  font-size: 11px;
  line-height: 1.3;
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: auto;
}
h1 { font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 4px; border-bottom: 2px solid #2c3e50; }
h2 { font-size: 14px; color: #2c3e50; margin: 8px 0 4px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd; }
h3 { font-size: 12px; color: #555; margin: 6px 0 2px 0; }
pre { font-size: 10px; padding: 4px 6px; margin: 2px 0; background: #f8f9fa; }
code { font-size: 10px; }
table { font-size: 10px; width: 100%; margin: 2px 0; }
td, th { padding: 2px 4px; }
.row { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.col { flex: 1; }
.col-wide { flex: 2; }
p { margin: 2px 0; }
```

# assemblykor - Korean National Assembly Data for Political Science Education

<div class="row">
<div class="col">

## Setup

```r
# Install
remotes::install_github("kyusik-yang/assemblykor")

# Load
library(assemblykor)

# Korean font for ggplot2
set_ko_font()
```

## 7 Built-in Datasets

| Dataset | Rows | Unit | Key |
|---------|------|------|-----|
| `legislators` | 947 | MP-assembly | `member_id` + `assembly` |
| `bills` | 60,925 | bill | `bill_id` |
| `wealth` | 2,928 | MP-year | `member_id` + `year` |
| `seminars` | 5,962 | MP-year | `member_id` + `year` |
| `speeches` | 15,843 | speech turn | `date` + `speech_order` |
| `votes` | 7,997 | bill vote | `bill_id` |
| `roll_calls` | 368,210 | MP-bill vote | `member_id` + `bill_id` |

## Dataset Relationships

```
legislators (member_id)
 ├── wealth      (member_id)
 ├── seminars    (member_id)
 ├── speeches    (member_id, 22nd only)
 ├── bills       (proposer_id)
 └── roll_calls  (member_id)
         └── votes (bill_id)
              └── bills (bill_id, ~40% match)
```

</div>
<div class="col">

## Key Variables

### legislators
`member_id` `assembly` `name` `party` `district` `district_type`
`gender` `seniority` `n_bills` `n_bills_lead`

### bills
`bill_id` `assembly` `bill_name` `committee` `propose_date`
`result` `proposer` `proposer_id`

### wealth
`member_id` `year` `total_assets` `net_worth` `real_estate`
`deposits` `stocks` `has_seoul_property` `has_gangnam_property`
*All monetary values in thousands of KRW*

### seminars
`member_id` `year` `assembly` `camp` `n_seminars`
`cross_party_ratio` `is_governing` `is_female`

### speeches
`speaker_name` `role` `member_id` `speech_order` `speech`
*Roles: legislator, chair, minister, witness, ...*

### votes
`bill_id` `assembly` `vote_date` `result` `voted` `yes` `no` `abstain`

### roll_calls
`bill_id` `member_id` `party` `vote` `vote_date`
*22nd assembly only (1,233 bills)*

</div>
<div class="col">

## Common Operations

### Load and explore
```r
data(legislators)
str(legislators)
summary(legislators$n_bills_lead)
```

### Join datasets
```r
library(dplyr)

# Legislators + wealth
leg_w <- legislators %>%
  inner_join(wealth, by = "member_id",
             relationship = "many-to-many")

# Roll calls + legislator metadata
rc_leg <- roll_calls %>%
  left_join(
    legislators %>% filter(assembly == 22),
    by = "member_id")
```

### Download extra data
```r
# Bill proposal texts (~40 MB)
texts <- get_bill_texts()

# Co-sponsorship records (~25 MB)
props <- get_proposers()
```

### File I/O teaching
```r
path_to_file()                    # List CSVs
path_to_file("legislators.csv")  # Get path
read.csv(path_to_file("legislators.csv"),
         fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
```

## 9 Tutorials (Korean)

```r
list_tutorials()     # See all
run_tutorial(1)      # Interactive (browser)
open_tutorial(1)     # Copy Rmd file
```

| # | Topic | Level |
|---|-------|-------|
| 1-2 | tidyverse, ggplot2 | Beginner |
| 3-5 | Regression, Panel, Text | Intermediate |
| 6-9 | Network, Roll call, Logit, Speech | Advanced |

</div>
</div>

<div style="text-align:center; font-size:9px; color:#999; margin-top:4px;">
assemblykor v0.1.0 | Kyusik Yang | https://github.com/kyusik-yang/assemblykor
</div>
